planning_decisions.decision: Modal width set to min(820px, 92vw) to match prototype approval
planning_decisions.rationale: Prototype user-commands-modal.html was approved with feedback_rounds=2. Width matches exactly.

planning_decisions.decision: PaletteSettings added as nested struct in Settings (not json.RawMessage)
planning_decisions.rationale: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 'existing assets > new implementation'. Other fields use typed structs; using json.RawMessage would be inconsistent and delay validation.

planning_decisions.decision: UserCommand target field validation: bash requires command, url requires url, files requires path
planning_decisions.rationale: AC-S032-1-1 requires schema validation. Reject on PATCH with 400 when contract violated.

planning_decisions.decision: userCommands inserted between builtins and Make/npm in command palette >mode
planning_decisions.rationale: S031 integration point: builtins registry near line 494. User-defined commands ranked higher than auto-detected Make/npm — user intentionality > automation.

planning_decisions.decision: updateMruBashTab wired in terminal-manager.ts sendInput path
planning_decisions.rationale: S031 flagged this as unwired. Must wire so MRU resolution in resolveBashTarget returns correct tab after user types in a bash terminal.

planning_decisions.decision: > mode capped at 40 items when in command mode (not all mode)
planning_decisions.rationale: S031 agent flagged: no cap on >mode. With builtins + user cmds + Make/npm a large Makefile could flood the list. Cap at 40 keeps scroll manageable.

planning_decisions.decision: Modal state held in React local state (not Zustand) — open/close and row edits
planning_decisions.rationale: DESIGN_PRINCIPLES: 'コンポーネント state は UI 一時状態のみ'. The modal's unsaved edits are ephemeral UI state, not app state.
